title: Robust Crunchy Mexican Cranberry Horchata
description: A refreshing and crunchy twist on traditional horchata, featuring cranberries and a hint of bhuna spice, perfect for a sweet and sour dessert
instructions: Rinse the rice and soak it in water for at least 4 hours or overnight
Drain and rinse the rice again, then add it to a blender with 2 cups of water and blend until smooth
Strain the rice mixture through a cheesecloth into a large bowl, squeezing out as much liquid as possible
Add the cranberries, bhuna spice blend, cinnamon sticks, and honey to the bowl and stir to combine
Add the almond milk to the bowl and stir to combine
Refrigerate the mixture for at least 2 hours or overnight to allow the flavors to meld
Just before serving, stir in the toasted pecans and lime zest
Serve the horchata chilled, garnished with additional toasted pecans and lime zest if desired
